name: Peanut Butter Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Bake the graham cracker pie shell according to package instructions until set.
3. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
4. In a mixer bowl, whip the cream cheese until light and fluffy.
5. Blend in the peanut butter and powdered sugar.
6. Gradually blend in milk, beating constantly.
7. Fold in the Cool Whip topping.
8. Spoon the mixture into the prepared pie shell.
9. Garnish with chopped peanuts if desired.
10. Cover tightly and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or until firm.
11. Serve chilled. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
